title: cinnamomum helicterifolium
intro: Cinnamomum helicterifolium, also known as Indian cinnamon or Malabar cinnamon, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood sugar levels, act as an anti-inflammatory, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum helicterifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce nausea, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Cinnamomum helicterifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine.
